overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a neon-lit urban street at night, entering a ramen shop, and exploring an open plaza with food stalls. The scene features vibrant neon signage, cyberpunk architecture, and NPC vendor interactions in a futuristic city environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon signage

events.description: approaching and entering the ramen shop entrance with neon heart sign

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade toward the brightly lit ramen shop entrance

notable_agents.action: couple walking together toward the shop entrance

entered.detail: overhead metal and glass structure with exposed utility pipes
large red neon sign depicting lips above shop entrance
red neon sign with Japanese characters indicating 24-hour service
black and yellow striped traffic bollards lining the walkway
open doorway with bead curtains and bright interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a covered cyberpunk walkway lined with neon signs and bollards, approaching a 24-hour ramen shop. The corridor features overhead utility pipes and glowing signage, with a few NPC pedestrians walking ahead. The atmosphere is dark but illuminated by vibrant red and pink neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: 24-hour ramen shop interior with neon decor

events.description: player examines the vendor and menu options at the counter

agents.ego_description: moving through the shop interior, observing the vendor behind the counter and examining the menu displays

notable_agents.action: shop vendor standing behind the counter preparing food

entered.detail: wooden counter with stools and food preparation area behind
shopkeeper working behind the counter with cooking equipment
rotating fans hanging from the ceiling with red lighting
digital menu board showing food items and prices
hanging bead curtain at the shop entrance

segments.scene_description: Inside the ramen shop, the player explores a narrow space with a central counter, ceiling fans, and neon lighting. A vendor stands behind the counter near cooking equipment, while digital menu displays glow on the walls. The environment is enclosed with bead curtains at the entrance and red ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from covered walkway to open urban plaza

events.description: exiting the covered shop area into the open plaza with trees and billboards

agents.ego_description: leaving the ramen shop and walking through a transitional covered area toward the open plaza

entered.detail: open urban space with trees and large digital billboards
massive screen displaying advertisements on building facade
tall trees with green foliage in the plaza area
white plastic bins and debris containers

segments.scene_description: The player exits the ramen shop through a back corridor, passing trash bins and debris, then emerges into a more open urban plaza. Large digital billboards become visible on building facades, and trees line the walkway. The lighting shifts from enclosed artificial to mixed outdoor neon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with food stalls and digital billboards

events.description: player approaches food stall vendor and examines items for sale

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, approaching a food stall where a vendor is preparing food

notable_agents.action: vendor in green pants and white shirt working at the food stall with glowing green glasses

entered.detail: outdoor food preparation counter with cooking equipment and condiments
tattooed vendor wearing white shirt and green pants with cybernetic green glasses
stainless steel food preparation station with warming trays
bottles and containers on the counter surface

segments.scene_description: In the open plaza, the player approaches an outdoor food stall where a vendor with distinctive green cybernetic glasses is working. The area features large digital billboards on surrounding buildings, scattered trash and debris on the asphalt ground, and various food preparation equipment. The scene maintains the cyberpunk aesthetic with neon lighting and urban decay elements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic neon corridor through a cramped eatery and out into a sprawling urban plaza. It begins by moving through a covered walkway lined with utility pipes and glowing red signage, following pedestrians toward a 24-hour ramen shop. As the camera crosses the threshold through bead curtains, the environment tightens into an enclosed space filled with ceiling fans, digital menus, and the warm glow of a vendor's cooking station. The scene then shifts as the camera exits through a narrow back corridor cluttered with debris, gradually opening up into a wider city square where the lighting transitions from artificial red to a mix of outdoor neon and towering digital billboards. Finally, the movement leads across the asphalt of the plaza toward an outdoor food stall, where a vendor with green cybernetic glasses works amidst the surrounding urban decay.
